name: Business Hours Only
description: Restricts agent actions to business hours (Mon-Fri, 9AM-5PM). Uses rate limit with a 0-request limit outside business hours via conditions.

rules.name: Business Hours Rate Limit
rules.description: Limit all agent actions to a reasonable rate during business hours (100 per hour).

rules.name: Block Sensitive Actions Outside Hours
rules.description: Require approval for send/write actions as extra safety layer.
